about.title: A public contribution map for crypto builders.
about.intro: Proof of Contribution pulls public contribution data directly from GitHub and turns merged pull requests into a simple contributor layer: who builds, where they contribute, and which projects concentrate open-source activity.
about.whyCopy: Crypto ecosystems rely on public infrastructure, but contribution is scattered across many repositories. This project makes that work easier to inspect.
about.measuresCopy: The current version focuses on merged pull requests by contributor, organization, project, and date. It is intentionally transparent and easy to reproduce.
about.dataCopy: The dataset is extracted from GitHub's public API when the project is refreshed, so the dashboard reflects the latest available repository activity from the scanned organizations.
about.usefulCopy: Raw PR data becomes more valuable once it is grouped into metrics: contributors, projects, organizations, and contribution concentration can be compared from the same public source of truth.

landing.heroIntro: Follow the contributors, projects, and ecosystems shaping open-source crypto through transparent, reproducible GitHub data.
landing.heroProof: Public data. Open methodology. Built to be verified.
landing.storyCopy: Valuable work is scattered across thousands of repositories. We turn accepted pull requests into a simple, inspectable map of open-source activity.
landing.collectCopy: We index merged pull requests from public GitHub repositories across each ecosystem.
landing.organizeCopy: Contributions are organized by person, project, ecosystem, and time.
landing.exploreSignalCopy: Find builders, compare ecosystems, and inspect every contribution at its source.
landing.insightsCopy: Understand the shape of an ecosystem, not just who has the highest count. Open any contributor to see their history, projects, recent work, and activity over time.
landing.transparentCopy: Every result comes from public repositories and links back to its source.
landing.reproducibleCopy: The collection scripts, dashboard, and methodology are open source.
landing.independentCopy: A neutral contribution layer designed to work across ecosystems.
landing.finalTitle:
Find the people building
the open-source future.
landing.finalCopy: Explore accepted work across crypto ecosystems in one public contribution map.
